title: Event envelope
description: v0 DRAFT. Standard envelope for every Vantrow Connect webhook delivery. data's shape is determined by type; see schemas/events/<type>.data.schema.json.

id.description: Globally unique event id. Consumers deduplicate on this (at-least-once delivery).

type.description: Event type (e.g. "project.status_changed"). Extension events are namespaced by vertical (e.g. "roofing.claim.status_changed").

occurred_at.description: RFC 3339 time the underlying change happened on the platform (not the delivery time). Consumers reconcile ordering with this plus the GET APIs.

version.description: Contract version of the payload. Matches the REST API major version.

data.description: Type-specific payload. Entity objects inside data are snapshots as of occurred_at.
